sql-analysis-reporting.title: SQL Analysis & Reporting
sql-analysis-reporting.description: A cumulative single-table SQL reporting course covering aliases, calculations, NULL safety, aggregate functions, GROUP BY, HAVING, CASE, conditional aggregation, module projects, and a final executive-report capstone.
sql-analysis-reporting.moreComingSoon: More SQL Analysis & Reporting lessons are coming soon.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-0-report-f.title: Readable Report Foundations
sql-analysis-reporting-module-0-report-f.description: Turn raw columns into clear, calculated report output with aliases, DISTINCT, arithmetic expressions, and rounding.
outcomes: Rename result columns with clear aliases.
Use DISTINCT to discover report categories without duplicate values.
Create calculated columns from existing numeric fields.
Round calculated values for readable business reports.
why: Builds confidence with readable report foundations.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-1-null-saf.title: Null-Safe Calculations and Business Labels
sql-analysis-reporting-module-1-null-saf.description: Build trustworthy calculations when values are missing, then turn numeric results into readable business labels.
outcomes: Predict how NULL affects arithmetic expressions.
Use COALESCE to provide explicit fallback values.
Calculate percentages and discounts safely.
Use CASE to produce readable categories and status labels.
why: Builds confidence with null-safe calculations and business labels.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-2-aggregat.title: Aggregate Functions and KPI Snapshots
sql-analysis-reporting-module-2-aggregat.description: Summarize an entire filtered dataset with counts, totals, averages, minimums, and maximums.
outcomes: Use COUNT(*) and COUNT(column) intentionally.
Calculate totals with SUM.
Calculate averages and explain NULL behavior.
Find smallest and largest values with MIN and MAX.
why: Builds confidence with aggregate functions and kpi snapshots.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-3-grouped-.title: Grouped Summaries and Ranked Scorecards
sql-analysis-reporting-module-3-grouped-.description: Use GROUP BY to calculate KPIs for each region, category, status, or carefully chosen combination.
outcomes: Group aggregate results by one column.
Group by more than one column and describe the resulting grain.
Sort grouped summaries by an aggregate result.
Recognize and fix common grouping mistakes.
why: Builds confidence with grouped summaries and ranked scorecards.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-4-having-a.title: HAVING and Conditional Reporting
sql-analysis-reporting-module-4-having-a.description: Filter grouped results, calculate conditional KPIs, and turn aggregate results into performance bands.
outcomes: Use WHERE to filter source rows before grouping.
Use HAVING to filter groups after aggregation.
Build conditional counts and totals with CASE inside aggregate functions.
Assign performance labels from aggregate results.
why: Builds confidence with having and conditional reporting.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-module-5-final-ca.title: Final Capstone: Executive Sales Performance Report
sql-analysis-reporting-module-5-final-ca.description: Plan, build, validate, and explain a complete single-table executive report using the full course toolkit.
outcomes: Translate a reporting brief into metrics, grain, filters, aliases, and sorting rules.
Audit the source dataset before building final calculations.
Build a complete grouped executive report progressively.
Validate results and explain findings in plain business language.
why: Builds confidence with final capstone: executive sales performance report.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Readable Report Output
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Make raw result sets easier for another person to read and reuse.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Calculated Report Columns
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Create useful numbers directly in a SELECT result.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Module Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Build a manager-ready order detail report one query improvement at a time.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Null-Safe Calculations
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Make the treatment of missing values explicit and testable.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Business Calculations and Labels
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Turn row-level data into net values and readable classifications.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Module Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Create a review queue for orders with missing or unusual discount data.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Counts and Totals
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Measure how much activity exists and how much value it represents.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Averages and Extremes
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Describe typical and boundary values in a dataset.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Module Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Combine multiple aggregate expressions into one executive snapshot.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Grouping Basics
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Turn one overall summary into one summary row per meaningful group.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Ranking and Grouping Quality
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Order grouped reports and prevent accidental over-grouping.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Module Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Create a ranked scorecard for regional and category performance.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Filtering Before and After Grouping
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Place each condition at the stage where it logically belongs.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Conditional KPIs and Labels
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Calculate multiple business outcomes from one grouped result.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Module Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Surface low-volume, low-value, or low-completion groups for management review.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Capstone Planning
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Convert stakeholder requirements into a precise report contract before writing the final query.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Capstone Data Readiness
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Audit the dataset and test the intended report grain before the final build.

sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.title: Final Capstone Project
sql-analysis-reporting-sql-analysis-repo.description: Build the final executive report through cumulative, fully validated query snapshots.
bullets: Final Capstone: Executive Sales Performance Report
